title: brittonastrum aurantiacum
intro: Brittonastrum aurantiacum, also known as Golden Chain Vine, is a flowering vine native to the southeastern United States and the Caribbean. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like wounds and eczema. The herbal preparations of Brittonastrum aurantiacum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
